ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., presidential, congressional, gubernatorial) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the election */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the election (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "winner_candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning candidate */,
  "total_votes_cast" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the election */,
  "voter_turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of eligible voters who participated in the election */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the election data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the election record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the election record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the candidate participated in */,
  "incumbent" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the candidate is an incumbent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the candidate */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the candidate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the candidate record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the candidate record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the result belongs to */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate the result belongs to */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total votes received by the candidate */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the result belongs to */,
  "total_votes_in_region" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the region */,
  "voter_turnout_percentage_in_region" REAL /* Percentage of eligible voters who participated in the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the result record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the result record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., state, county, district) */,
  "parent_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent region (if applicable) */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the region record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the region record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the demographic data belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Average age of the population */,
  "income" REAL /* Average income of the population */,
  "race" TEXT /* Racial composition of the region */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic composition of the region */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution in the region */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Average education level in the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the demographic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the demographic record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES geographic_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_systems" (
  "voting_system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting system */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the voting system belongs to */,
  "voting_system_type" TEXT /* Type of voting system used (e.g., paper ballot, electronic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the voting system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the voting system record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the voting system record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_systems_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES geographic_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the official is responsible for */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the official */,
  "official_title" TEXT /* Title of the official */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the official */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the official */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the official record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the official record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_officials_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES geographic_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, researcher) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "GEOID20" (
  "GEOID20" TEXT /* Geographic identifier */,
  "STATEFP" TEXT /* State FIPS code */,
  "COUNTYFP" TEXT /* County FIPS code */,
  "DISTRICT" TEXT /* District code */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the GEOID20 belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the GEOID20 record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the GEOID20 record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("GEOID20"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_GEOID20_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES geographic_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_data" (
  "G16PRERTRU" REAL /* Election data for Trump */,
  "G16PREDCLI" REAL /* Election data for Clinton */,
  "G16PRELJOH" REAL /* Election data for Johnson */,
  "G16PREGSTE" REAL /* Election data for Stein */,
  "G16PREOFUE" REAL /* Election data for Other */,
  "G16PREOWRI" REAL /* Election data for Write-in */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the election data belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the election data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the election data record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("G16PRERTRU"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES geographic_regions ("region_id")
)
